name: Beer Batter for Fritters
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix flour and baking powder.
2. Add remaining ingredients and beat until smooth.
3. To fry: Dip chunks of food into batter.
4. Fry in 3-4 inches of fat at 375 degrees Fahrenheit until golden brown.
5. Drain on paper toweling.
6. Sprinkle fruit fritters with confectioners sugar or top with a sweet sauce.
